page: Microsoft Azure D96ads_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Dadsv7 family, powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor. This server features 96 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 48 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The system is equipped with 384.0 GB of memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It includes 5669 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

In benchmark evaluations, the D96ads_v7 demonstrates top-tier performance, placing in the top 10% for both single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests. Its memory subsystem achieves top-tier write bandwidth and strong read bandwidth. Cryptographic and compression capabilities are highly efficient, with top-tier results in gzip compression, bzip3 decompression, and PassMark CPU encryption tests. Database operations and Redis SET benchmarks also rank in the top 10%, alongside high static web serving throughput.

The hardware configuration delivers high resource density and balanced compute-to-memory ratios, making it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for demanding enterprise workloads. The combination of 96 dedicated vCPUs, a large 5669 GB local disk, and high-speed memory bandwidth makes this server well-suited for relational databases, large-scale Redis deployments, static web serving at scale, and CPU-based LLM inference tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure D96ads_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Dadsv7 family, powered by a dedicated 96-vCPU AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 48 physical cores. It features 384.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core, and includes 5669 GB of local storage. Operating on Microsoft Hyper-V, this server delivers top-tier performance across multi-core CPU benchmarks, database operations, and Redis SET transactions, placing in the top 10% of tested systems. Its memory architecture supports strong read and top-tier write bandwidth. With its high resource density and substantial local storage, the D96ads_v7 is optimized for enterprise databases, high-throughput web serving, and CPU-based machine learning inference.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D96ads_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 5669 GB of local storage, delivering top-tier database and multi-core CPU performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D96ads_v7 is a 96-vCPU general-purpose VM with 384 GB RAM and 5669 GB local storage, optimized for databases and enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-density general-purpose server combining ninety-six dedicated AMD EPYC vCPUs with massive local storage for demanding enterprise databases.
bullet_points: Powered by a 96-vCPU AMD EPYC 9V45 processor with 48 physical cores
Equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory and 5669 GB of local storage
Delivers top-tier performance in multi-core CPU and database benchmarks
Supports advanced vector and cryptographic instruction sets
Optimized for enterprise databases, Redis deployments, and web serving
